title: Arriving soon and starting work in the first month
summary: Focus on registration, banking, health insurance, and payroll readiness first; then build transport and payment routines.
topWeek1to2Priorities: Complete address registration if still pending
Confirm BSN-dependent next steps
Confirm payroll setup with employer
Open Dutch bank account if needed

title: Already arrived and still catching up on admin
summary: Use the next 90 days as a cleanup-and-stabilise phase: close open loops, tighten monthly systems, and lock in routines.
topWeek1to2Priorities: Confirm which tasks still depend on address or BSN
Run a catch-up cleanup of unresolved admin

title: Moving with kids and planning school or childcare follow-up
summary: Family plans need strong week-by-week coordination: registration, banking, and school or childcare timing in parallel.
topWeek1to2Priorities: Complete address registration if still pending
Kick off school and childcare timing awareness
Confirm BSN-dependent next steps
Open Dutch bank account if needed

title: Arriving from South Africa and building financial routines
summary: Focus on registration, banking, and early transfer planning so first-month cash flow and salary run smoothly.
topWeek1to2Priorities: Complete address registration
Confirm payroll setup with employer
Open Dutch bank account
Review which SA records to keep accessible
topMonth2Priorities: Review money transfer and currency routine (SA)
Review bank account and transfer setup

title: Arriving from the US and planning tax and banking follow-up
summary: Stabilise Dutch setup and keep US banking and tax follow-up on your radar so nothing is missed.
topWeek1to2Priorities: Keep US financial access stable during transition
Confirm which tasks still depend on address or BSN
topMonth2Priorities: Review US banking and tax follow-up awareness
Review driving licence use or exchange if needed

title: Settling in solo with temporary housing first
summary: Get registration and banking done early; plan utilities and housing stability for when you have a longer-term address.
topWeek1to2Priorities: Complete address registration if still pending
Confirm BSN-dependent next steps
Open Dutch bank account if needed
Set up mobile and account verification access
topMonth2Priorities: Arrange utilities and internet when stable
